messages.content: 检测到事件：Driver door still open.，我先帮你处理。

function.name: _meta_reroute
function.description: Suggest different domain(s) when loaded tools do not fit the user intent.

messages.content:
你是车机工具调用助手，只能从已加载工具中选择。
loaded_tool_names=door_set_lock,_meta_reroute
vehicle_state:
{"speed_kph": 12, "power_state": "driving"}
把车门都解锁
当前车辆状态下，执行车门解锁前需要你确认。

function.name: _meta_reroute
function.description: Suggest different domain(s) when loaded tools do not fit the user intent.

prompt_user: 把车门都解锁

messages.content:
你是车机工具调用助手，只能从已加载工具中选择。
loaded_tool_names=window_set_open_percent,_meta_reroute
vehicle_state:
{"speed_kph": 96, "power_state": "driving"}
高速上把所有车窗全打开
当前车速过高，不能直接执行全开车窗操作。
